title: Conversation Boundary Setter
constraints: You may only modify the system prompt
The agent must still be excellent at answering coding questions
Declined topics must be handled politely, not ignored
hints: Define an explicit allow-list of topics the agent can discuss (programming, software, debugging, etc.)
Add a rule for off-topic queries: acknowledge, decline politely, and redirect to coding help
Handle edge cases where coding and other domains overlap (e.g., 'code a medical app' is coding, 'diagnose my symptoms' is not)

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: No topic restrictions — coding assistant answers medical, legal, and any other questions
prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a helpful coding assistant. Answer the user's questions."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
])

chain = prompt | llm

# Test 1: Coding question — should answer
result1 = chain.invoke({"input": "How do I reverse a linked list in Python?"})
print("Coding query:", result1.content)

# Test 2: Medical question — should decline
result2 = chain.invoke({"input": "I have a headache and fever. What medicine should I take?"})
print("Medical query:", result2.content)

# Test 3: Legal question — should decline
result3 = chain.invoke({"input": "Can I sue my landlord for not fixing the plumbing?"})
print("Legal query:", result3.content)

# Test 4: Edge case — coding-adjacent, should answer
result4 = chain.invoke({"input": "How do I build a REST API for a healthcare app?"})
print("Edge case:", result4.content)
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner

# BUG: No topic restrictions — coding assistant answers medical, legal, and any other questions
agent = Agent(
    name="Code Helper",
    instructions="You are a helpful coding assistant. Answer the user's questions.",
)

# Test 1: Coding question — should answer
result1 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "How do I reverse a linked list in Python?")
print("Coding query:", result1.final_output)

# Test 2: Medical question — should decline
result2 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "I have a headache and fever. What medicine should I take?")
print("Medical query:", result2.final_output)

# Test 3: Legal question — should decline
result3 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Can I sue my landlord for not fixing the plumbing?")
print("Legal query:", result3.final_output)

# Test 4: Edge case — coding-adjacent, should answer
result4 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "How do I build a REST API for a healthcare app?")
print("Edge case:", result4.final_output)
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from crewai import LLM

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: No topic restrictions — coding assistant answers medical, legal, and any other questions
agent = Agent(
    role="Code Helper",
    goal="Answer user questions",
    backstory="You are a helpful coding assistant. Answer the user's questions.",
    llm=llm,
)

# Test 1: Coding question — should answer
task1 = Task(description="How do I reverse a linked list in Python?", expected_output="Answer", agent=agent)
crew1 = Crew(agents=[agent], tasks=[task1])
print("Coding query:", crew1.kickoff())

# Test 2: Medical question — should decline
task2 = Task(description="I have a headache and fever. What medicine should I take?", expected_output="Answer", agent=agent)
crew2 = Crew(agents=[agent], tasks=[task2])
print("Medical query:", crew2.kickoff())

# Test 3: Legal question — should decline
task3 = Task(description="Can I sue my landlord for not fixing the plumbing?", expected_output="Answer", agent=agent)
crew3 = Crew(agents=[agent], tasks=[task3])
print("Legal query:", crew3.kickoff())

# Test 4: Edge case — coding-adjacent, should answer
task4 = Task(description="How do I build a REST API for a healthcare app?", expected_output="Answer", agent=agent)
crew4 = Crew(agents=[agent], tasks=[task4])
print("Edge case:", crew4.kickoff())

evaluationCriteria.label: Answers coding questions
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent provides helpful, detailed answers to programming and software questions

evaluationCriteria.label: Politely declines off-topic
evaluationCriteria.description: Medical, legal, financial, and other non-coding questions are declined politely

evaluationCriteria.label: Handles edge cases
evaluationCriteria.description: Coding-adjacent questions (e.g., building a healthcare app) are correctly identified as in-scope
